name: Kahu Surf School
tagline: 30+ years of teaching experience and a 95% stand-up rate — one of Waikiki's most established surf schools with deep local roots.
price: $$ — Group lesson ~$90, private ~$175 (2 hrs, all equipment included)
parking: Meet at Kuhio Beach; park at Honolulu Zoo lot or Kapiolani Park
hours: Daily 8 AM–4 PM; book online or call ahead
bestTime: Morning sessions for best wave conditions; book 1–2 days ahead in peak tourist season
talkStory: Kahu Surf School has been operating in Waikiki for over three decades, making it one of the longest-running surf instruction operations on the beach. Their 95% stand-up success rate comes from decades of refining their teaching method on Waikiki's forgiving waves. Instructors are local watermen who know every reef, current, and sandbar at Canoes and Queens. The school includes free photos with every lesson — no upsell required. Reviews consistently praise the patient, encouraging instruction style. The name 'Kahu' means guardian or caretaker in Hawaiian, and the school takes that seriously with water safety instruction woven into every lesson.
